---
title: "\'The Charity Bazaar and Women\'s Professionalization in Charlotte Mary Yonge\'s The Daisy Chain\'"
---

## \'The Charity Bazaar and Women\'s Professionalization in Charlotte Mary Yonge\'s The Daisy Chain\'

**Author:** Leslee Thorne-Murphy
**Date:** 2007
**Imprint:** i>Studies in English Literature 1500-1900</i> 47, 881-9

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
